name: National Legal Services Authority (NALSA) Helpline
description: Direct government helpline providing free legal advice, counseling, and assistance to eligible marginalized citizens under the Legal Services Authorities Act.

name: Women Helpline (NCW)
description: National Commission for Women helpline providing support, shelter referrals, and police coordination to women facing violence or harassment.

name: Childline India Helpline
description: A nationwide, toll-free, 24-hour emergency phone outreach service for children in need of care and protection.

name: National Consumer Helpline
description: Under the Ministry of Consumer Affairs, handles queries, grievances, and complaints regarding consumer rights violation and corporate fraud.

name: Senior Citizen National Helpline (Elderline)
description: Toll-free helpline providing information, guidance, emotional support, and rescue services to senior citizens nationwide.
